summary: Excellent stereo‑separated recording capturing a heavenly performance from start to finish.
review: The reviewer hails this tape as one of their favorites, praising its killer stereo separation, depth and crystal‑clear clarity—hallmarks of an outstanding soundboard capture. Equally, the show is described as “heavenly” from cover to cover, indicating a consistently high level of musical performance throughout the concert.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed 5‑star review praises both the audio fidelity and the overall performance, suggesting an exceptional show with excellent recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Killer stereo separation, notable depth and clarity throughout; no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Performance described as heavenly from start to finish, indicating a uniformly strong set.
